commands.name: ps
commands.description: Lists the dotnet processes that stack traces can be collected from.

commands.name: report
commands.description: reports the managed stacks from a running .NET process

options.name: --process-id
options.description: The process id to report the stack.

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the process to report the stack.

commands.name: symbolicate
commands.description: Get the line number from the Method Token and IL Offset in a stacktrace

options.name: --search-dir
options.description: Path of multiple directories with assembly and pdb [default: C:\Users\Jonas\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-static-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-6b76f4240e3c4150b406cfd48c4c07a1\dotnet-home|C:\Users\Jonas\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-static-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-6b76f4240e3c4150b406cfd48c4c07a1\home|C:\Users\Jonas\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-static-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-6b76f4240e3c4150b406cfd48c4c07a1\nuget-http-cache|C:\Users\Jonas\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-static-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-6b76f4240e3c4150b406cfd48c4c07a1\nuget-packages|C:\Users\Jonas\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-static-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-6b76f4240e3c4150b406cfd48c4c07a1\tool|C:\Users\Jonas\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-static-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-6b76f4240e3c4150b406cfd48c4c07a1\xdg-cache|C:\Users\Jonas\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-static-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-6b76f4240e3c4150b406cfd48c4c07a1\xdg-config|C:\Users\Jonas\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-static-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-6b76f4240e3c4150b406cfd48c4c07a1\xdg-data|C:\Users\Jonas\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-static-dotnet-stack-9.0.661903-6b76f4240e3c4150b406cfd48c4c07a1\xdg-runtime]

arguments.name: input-path
arguments.description: Path to the stacktrace text file
